bugs.report_text: The main content area is being pushed far off-screen, leaving only a blank white space visible.
The modal dialog is appearing behind other page elements instead of appearing on top and taking user focus.
bugs.neg_code:
<Modal
        isOpen={isModalOpen}
        title="Delete Account?"
        message="Are you sure you want to delete your account? All of your data will be permanently removed."
        warning="This action cannot be undone."
        onConfirm={handleDelete}
        onCancel={handleCancel}
        confirmText="Delete Forever"
        cancelText="Cancel"
        isLoading={isDeleting}
      />

bugs.report_text: The notification toast is hidden completely off the bottom edge of the viewport and cannot be seen.
bugs.pos_code: {toast && ( setToast(null)} /> )}

bugs.report_text: The settings section has excessive internal padding that breaks the page layout and pushes content beyond visible boundaries.
The stats items collapse and fail to display in a proper multi-column grid layout, appearing as a broken single column.
